gallery.subtitle: Our dishes, our spaces, our moments.

aboutPreview.body: After years at Michelin-starred kitchens in New York and Lyon, Chef Bellamy opened The Meridian with a simple vision: celebrate the best seasonal ingredients with global techniques and warm, unhurried hospitality. Every dish tells a story of place and season.
aboutPreview.headline: Chef Marcus Bellamy's Vision

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.quote: The tasting menu was a revelation — every course more surprising than the last. This is what New York dining should be.

testimonials.name: James Chen
testimonials.quote: The cocktail program alone is worth the visit. Creative, balanced, and beautifully presented.

testimonials.name: Maria Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: We hosted our rehearsal dinner here and it was perfect. The private dining room, the service, the food — everything exceeded expectations.

testimonials.name: David Park
testimonials.quote: The seasonal menu keeps us coming back every few months. Chef Bellamy's duck dish in autumn is not to be missed.

items.title: Thursday Wine Pairing Dinner
items.description: Five courses paired with wines from Napa Valley, presented by our sommelier David Chen.

items.title: Spring Foraging Dinner
items.description: A collaboration with forager Mika Torres featuring wild ramps, fiddleheads, and morels.

items.title: Friday Jazz Supper Club
items.description: Live jazz trio, three-course prix fixe, and craft cocktails every Friday evening.
